title: Tender Festive Sweet Potato Stir-fry
description: An earthy and festive Peruvian dish featuring sweet potatoes cooked with chili powder for a whole30-friendly meal.
instructions: Cut sweet potatoes into thin slices and bell pepper into strips.
Toss the sweet potato slices with chili powder, a pinch of salt, and some oil. Spread evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the oven for 18-20 minutes until golden brown and tender.
In a separate pan over medium heat, add a few drops of vegetable oil if needed, then sauté minced garlic till fragrant.
Add roasted sweet potatoes to the pan. Cook for an additional 3-5 minutes mixing in between to combine flavors.
Remove from heat and serve hot as a side dish or main course.
